g.text: OCI Security List Reconcile State Machine
read spec, status, delete intent, and OCI lifecycle
- Later-page name matches must keep using the resolved OCID
- Partial OCI-side application of an already-submitted full
rule set remains outside the modeled guarantee.
- Confirm deletion with follow-up GetSecurityList calls
until the resource is gone or not found.
unsupported or immutable drift is detected
wait for the spec or live state to change
OCI deletion is confirmed and the finalizer can be removed
